1	use thiserror::Error;

3	/// Explicit list of permitted wildcard roots (§6 / §12 Q7).
4	///
5	/// Any wildcard like `orbit.graph.*` must have its root prefix on this list.
6	/// Top-level `orbit.*` is deliberately NOT permitted — the max-depth-2 rule
7	/// the design doc mentions is implemented here as an explicit allowlist so the
8	/// set grows deliberately and every reviewer sees the full scope.
9	pub const V2_TOOL_WILDCARD_ROOTS: &[&str] = &[
10	    "orbit.graph.",
11	    "orbit.task.",
12	    "orbit.audit.",
13	    "fs.",
14	    "proc.",
15	];
16	
17	#[derive(Debug, Error)]
18	pub enum ToolAllowlistError {
19	    #[error("wildcard root not permitted: `{0}` (see V2_TOOL_WILDCARD_ROOTS)")]
20	    WildcardRootNotPermitted(String),
21	    #[error("empty tool name in allowlist")]
22	    EmptyName,
23	}
24	
25	/// Validate an activity's declared tool allowlist at asset-load time.
26	/// Returns Ok(()) when every entry is a concrete tool name or a permitted
27	/// wildcard root. Does NOT verify that concrete tool names resolve in the
28	/// registry — that's a separate load-time check at the engine layer.
29	pub fn validate_tool_allowlist(allowlist: &[String]) -> Result<(), ToolAllowlistError> {
